login.codeSent: Code sent to {email}, check your email and enter it below

hero.subtitle: Inspired by Pivotal Tracker. Built for truly Agile teams.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.desc: No stories lost or hidden - everyone sees the same backlog

dragAndDrop.title: Drag & Drop
dragAndDrop.desc: Easy drag-based prioritization that just works

kanbanFlow.title: Flow-Based Workflow
kanbanFlow.desc: Kanban-style - just work on the next item in your backlog

tagViews.title: Smart Tag Views
tagViews.desc: Simple tag-based views for flexible filtering

autoVelocity.title: Auto Velocity Tracking
autoVelocity.desc: Velocity and estimation dates tracked automatically

agileFirst.title: Agile-First Design
agileFirst.desc: Unmatched visibility and simplicity for real Agile teams

epics.title: Epics
epics.desc: Group related stories into epics for high-level planning and tracking

githubIntegration.title: GitHub Push Integration
githubIntegration.desc: Link commits to stories automatically via GitHub webhook - just mention the story ID in your commit message

fast.title: Fast and Responsive
fast.desc: Optimized for speed and efficiency, no need to reload pages - changes by other users are reflected instantly

projects.title: Projects
projects.name: Name
projects.importForbidden: You do not have permission to overwrite this project
projects.importExistsConfirm: The project {name} already exists, are you sure you want to update it?
projects.webhookInstructions: Set this URL as a webhook in your GitHub repository settings (Settings → Webhooks → Add webhook). Use "application/json" content type. Commits with messages starting with "#storyId" will be added as comments.
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete project {name}?

loginCode.subject: StoryTracker login code
loginCode.bodyHtml: Welcome! Your one-time StoryTracker login code is {code}. If you didn't request this code, please ignore this message.

errors.staleEntity: Modified by another user, please refresh the page
errors.paymentGatewayTimeout: Card payment gateway did not respond, please try again after a few minutes
errors.notFoundInstructions: Please check the URL in the address bar and try again
errors.networkUnavailable: Cannot connect to the server, please try again later
errors.notJson: Communication with server is blocked, please check your network connection
